title: Hanna (disambiguation)
content:
'''Hanna''' could refer to the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Hanna City]]''', the capital of [[Chandrila]]
*'''[[Hanna pendant]]''', also known as a [[Chandrilan]] medal of freedom, jewelry worn by Chandrilans such as [[Mon Mothma]]
*'''[[Hanna Smith]]''', a planned guest of [[Perrin Fertha]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Hanna City/Legends|'''Hanna City''']], the capital of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]
*'''[[Hanna Ding]]''', an [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]
*'''[[Hanna Doshun]]''', daughter of [[Jimm Doshun|Jimm]] and [[Merri Shen Doshun]]
*[[Hanna pendant/Legends|'''Hanna pendant''']], jewelry worn by [[Chandrilan/Legends|Chandrilans]] such as [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]
*'''[[Hanna S'kiyah]]''', a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*'''[[Hanna system/Legends|Hanna system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]
*'''[[Hanna Wild Game Reserve]]''', a location outside Hanna City

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Hanna
}}
